titleStmt.title: SII 9.372: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 372. (A.R. No. 446 of 1914.) ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE KOTESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTNAKALLU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1185, Dundubhi, Kārtika, śu. 15, Sōmavāra, vyatīpāta, Saṅkrānti, grahaṇa. In Dundubhi, Kārttika śu. 15 corresponded to A.D. 1262 October 28 Saturday, not Monday, Vṛiśchika-Saṅkrānti; but on that day there was no lunar eclipse. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Yādava king Mahādēvarāya ruling from Dēvagiri. It records that a certain Maduvaya of Kōṭiganūru obtained five mattars of land as a gift from the five hundred Mahājanas of the village Kauravagrāma, known as southern Ayyāvoḷe in Māsavāḍi one-hundred and forty, and made a gift of the same for the service of the god Kōṭiśaṅkaradēva on the right bank of the Tuṅgabhadrā river. Chāvōja, son of Indōja, engraved this.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmatu samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīsēvaṇamahādēvarāyavijeyarājyada śakavarṣa 1185 neya duṁdubhisaṁvatsarado
ḷu dēvagiryya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta(ṁ)mire svasti śrīmatu samastapraśastisahitaṁ māsavāḍi nū
ṟanālvatakaṁ śirōmaṇiyenisida dakṣiṇaAiyāvaḷe Enippa kauravagrāmadūroḍeyapramukhyavāgainūrvvaru dakṣiṇavāra
ṇāśiyanippa tuṁgabhadreya dakṣiṇatīradalu nelasida svayaṁbhuśrīkōṭiśaṁkharadēvarige Ā saṁvatsarada kārtika śu 15 sō
mavāra byatīpāta saṁkrāṁti grahaṇada Aga(ṁ)ṇyapu(ṁ)ṇyatithiyalu kōṭiganūra maduvainu A Ainūrvvara kaiyyalu
dhārāpūrbbakavāgi haḍadu Ā śrīśaṁkharadēvarige halumaṁḍagege śrīmānyavāgi biṭṭama taru 5 śrīśaṁkhara
svasti śrīmatu sūrilliya Iṁdōjana putra cāvōjaṁ nūṟippadiṁbara tottu śāsanamaṁ kaṁḍarisidāta
sarasvatīdēviya varaprasāda maṁgaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
